targetInputs.label: Extra attack count
targetInputs.tooltip: Number of extra attacks (thrash) the boss casts per proc

targetInputs.label: Extra attack proc chance %
targetInputs.tooltip: Chance, in percent, for the boss to cast extra attacks (thrash). (ie. 25 = 25% chance to proc on each melee swing)

targetInputs.label: Extra attack cooldown
targetInputs.tooltip: Internal cooldown of thrash, in seconds

targetInputs.label: Cleave cooldown
targetInputs.tooltip: Internal cooldown, in seconds, for the boss to cast cleave attack

targetInputs.label: Cleave damage multiplier
targetInputs.tooltip: Multiplier for the damage of cleave attacks. (ie. 50 = 50% of min base damage)

targetInputs.label: Has Magic spell
targetInputs.tooltip: Boss can cast a magic spell

targetInputs.label: Magic spell cast time
targetInputs.tooltip: Cast time, in seconds, for the boss to cast the magic spell

targetInputs.label: Magic spell cooldown
targetInputs.tooltip: Internal cooldown of the Magic spell, in seconds

targetInputs.label: Magic spell min damage
targetInputs.tooltip: Minimum damage of the magic spell cast by the boss

targetInputs.label: Magic spell max damage
targetInputs.tooltip: Maximum damage of the magic spell cast by the boss

targetInputs.label: Magic Spell School
targetInputs.tooltip: Spell school of the magic spell cast by the boss
